# Reinsoft IT Solutions
# AI / LLM Context File (llms.txt)

## Company Overview
Reinsoft IT Solutions is a premier custom software, web, and mobile app development agency dedicated to building scalable digital solutions. We design, develop, and deliver high-performance applications tailored to specific business requirements.

## Core Services
1. Custom Software / CRM Development: Bespoke software solutions, legacy system modernization, and scalable enterprise tools.
2. Web Development: Business websites, lead generation systems, and dynamic e-commerce platforms.
3. Mobile App Development: Native (iOS/Android) and Cross-Platform (React Native, Flutter) application development.
4. Long-Term Support & Growth: Security patch management, continuous system updates, and persistent performance audits.

## Technology Stack
- Frontend: React.js, Next.js, HTML5, CSS3, Tailwind CSS.
- Mobile: React Native, Flutter, Swift, Kotlin.
- Backend & Architecture: Node.js, RESTful APIs, Microservices, Cloud infrastructure.

## Vision & Commitment
Our mission is to bridge the gap between abstract ideas and flawless execution. We prioritize delivering aesthetically exceptional, logically sound, and conversion-optimized digital products that elevate brands and engage audiences across devices.

For more information or queries, contact us at info@reinsoft.tech or via our website.
